name: Mixedbread AI
pricing_notes: Free tier: 10K embedding requests/mo; Starter $19/mo; Scale $99/mo

performance.notes: Fast embedding generation; optimized inference for large-v1 models

agent_readiness.notes: High-quality embeddings + reranking API. mxbai-embed-large-v1 competitive with OpenAI text-embedding-3-large on MTEB. OpenAI-compatible API for drop-in migration. Also open-source HuggingFace models available for self-hosting.

gotchas: Newer company — less proven at enterprise scale vs OpenAI/Cohere
Free tier (10K requests/mo) limited for development
Reranking less mature than Cohere Rerank
best_when: Cost-optimizing embedding workloads vs OpenAI text-embedding-3 pricing
Teams wanting MTEB top-performing embeddings without OpenAI dependency
Use cases where mxbai-embed-large-v1 outperforms alternatives for your data
avoid_when: Enterprise requirements with vendor risk concerns
Already optimized OpenAI embeddings working well
summary: Mixedbread AI provides high-quality embedding and reranking APIs with models competitive with OpenAI and Cohere on MTEB benchmarks. mxbai-embed-large-v1 is freely available on HuggingFace for self-hosting. OpenAI-compatible API for easy migration. Best for teams optimizing embedding cost/quality who want an alternative to OpenAI text-embedding-3 with self-hosting option.
